Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 22 0 109 25 25 20}Can you believe I went to the faculty office and said all that? I even surprised myself a bit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This whole thing is just... Hehe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Remember when I said, "I can't allow that!" to the student council president? Hehe...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's just, when I thought about you and Miss President being alone in a room together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I got really mad at even the thought of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro has a refreshed smile on her face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I've been like that ever since I was little, or so my mom says.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Normally, I'm quiet and timid, but when it comes to something I care about, I get really aggressive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Actually... I've wanted to say it for a while, but I didn't think I had it in me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better choose my words carefully here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better choose my words carefully here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, {f 0 1 2}I have a special{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}relationship with another person already{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It feels like something out of a manga.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 22 0 109 53 25 20}Um, uh... I hope we continue to get along well together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have entered a special[n]relationship with Chihiro...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no going back now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Oh! I still have to apologize to the student council president.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I'd like for us to be able to go home together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After speaking with Mitsuru, we[n]headed back home together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I ended up getting home[n]a little later than usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Then, do you think... we could still be friends?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I'm just glad that we're still closer than when we first met.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Oh! I still have to apologize to the student council president.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I think I owe her an explanation, so... Excuse me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Chihiro, then[n]headed back to the dorm alone...[n]{f 1 1}
